objective: Identify whether the forced wire-render bug comes from the comment window only, the grid/comment region through 0x1A5F, or bytes beyond 0x1A5F

hypothesis.finding: Fresh no-comment and fresh max1400 natives are not in the same source family even though both author as R,...,:,NOP. Copying only comment bytes onto the fresh no-comment baseline is therefore insufficient for like-for-like synthesis.

entries.label: grcmfs_commentwin_full
entries.probe_focus: copy full comment window only from fresh max1400 donor onto fresh no-comment baseline

entries.label: grcmfs_commentgrid
entries.probe_focus: copy comment/trailer/grid region through 0x1A5F from fresh max1400 donor onto fresh no-comment baseline

entries.label: grcmfs_pregrid_header_commentgrid
entries.probe_focus: copy everything through 0x1A5F from fresh max1400 donor onto fresh no-comment baseline
